But the impact on retailers&rsquo; efforts to prevent inventory loss remains unclear.</p> Daphne Howland Wed, 13 May 2026 12:30:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/organized-retail-crime-bill-passes-house-bipartisan-vote/820105/ Rent the Runway co-founder Jennifer Hyman steps down as CEO https://www.retaildive.com/news/rent-the-runway-co-founder-jennifer-hyman-steps-down-ceo-nordstrom-interim/820127/ <p>Longtime Nordstrom veteran Teri Bariquit, once the department store&rsquo;s chief merchant, will take over as interim chief executive officer and president.</p> Daphne Howland Wed, 13 May 2026 12:22:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/rent-the-runway-co-founder-jennifer-hyman-steps-down-ceo-nordstrom-interim/820127/ On maintains momentum with record Q1 sales https://www.retaildive.com/news/on-running-q1-earnings-sales-growth-momentum/820094/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/vISN2LIlhFObvG21w433fv47jeAeKO-AzBSx6dVCigw/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9CcmFuZF9QUl8tX1NTMjZfWmVuZGF5YV94X09uX0NhbXBhaWduX1N0aWxsc18xX2NvcHkuanBn.webp"/></div></figure><p>The athleticwear brand set a new baseline for gross margin with strong DTC and apparel growth but room for improvement in the Americas.</p> Lara Ewen Wed, 13 May 2026 11:51:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/on-running-q1-earnings-sales-growth-momentum/820094/
